meta.description:
Little moments lead to big friendships. Share yours on Instagram. 
—From Meta

Connect with friends, find other fans, and see what people around you are up to and into. Explore your interests and post what's going on, from your daily moments to life's highlights.

Share what you’re up to and into on Insta®.
- Keep up with friends on the fly with Stories and Notes that disappear after 24 hours.
- Start group chats and share unfiltered moments with your Close Friends.
- Share memories from recent

helpful_positive.text: For some reason when I do the "mixed" option for my posts (both landscape and portrait), it ends up looking odd and cropped or zoomed in when posted. It must be a major bug. I asked some of my friends to check to see if it looked odd on their end. One said it looked fine, another friend said it was fine until they started swiping to see more photos, and it looks okay on my page, but then on the feed it looks cropped. So please fix this bug ASAP. It is very frustrating. I'm on Android.

First, they took down my account for sharing content that's not allowed ( I never share anything ). To make an appeal, I have to give my number, which somehow they can't find. There is no other option to reactivate my account and this has happened to a few other friends too, so it really is the app being dumb. If anyone else has this problem, just hit the 1 star review so they can't take them out of Play store :)

The new update is so buggy. Let's say I am going to post 5 photos, and I select to zoom them out so they aren't so close to my face. I can only zoom out one, and if I select more than 1 photo, it unzooms all of them. It has never done this before. The comments and notifications are weird as well. They glitch out, and when I go to click on the notification in the app, it doesn't let me, or it takes multiple times for it to work and bring me to where I need to be. Hope they fix this soon.

if you send someone a link to a post now, it will have your profile attached to it, even if it wasn't your post. they get a popup with whatever account you were logged in to prompting them to follow it. instagram made this change without any notification. details of your profile should not be attached when you copy / paste a link to a post that wasn't even yours, especially when you have all options to make your account visible to contacts / searchable by email disabled.

I deleted Instagram for a while to take a break from social media, came back to it and wish I hadn't. I don't know what the hell happened to this app but my feed refuses to load properly and gets stuck in an infinite loading loop. Even after closing and re-opening the app upwards of 10 times, it still struggles to process a feed. On the rare occasions it does, half of those times it loads a whopping TWO posts before I reach the bottom of the page and try to refresh again, and well....you know

I try to log into the account I've had for years. It says my password is wrong when I know for a fact it isn't. I go to reset my password. After all the steps it says,"error try again later" or just an empty text box with the words "ok". I tried my phone number, email, friend verification, every single method. And I'm just denied access to my account for no reasons. Not to mention they keep disabling my side accounts without a single reason.

I'm having this issue. So basically, whatever, if you upload a reels, it just uploading. But however, sometimes the reels cannot be upload halfway, leading the app to crash, and the video uploading process to reset. I try submitting report problems, it did absolutely nothing. If you're seeing this review, I recommend uploading reals that are 10 minutes or under.

Gives you copious amounts of options for notification settings, but completely ignores them. I tried turning off every single notification for my 2nd account, and I now get MORE notifications from it than I used to! Something's straight up broken with it. Terrible, had to just blanket block Instagram from my phone's settings because it absolutely does not follow the settings in the app. The annoying part is that I still wanted notifications from my other account.

Can't login to my account because of the over-the-top security measures. they send me a text verification code and when I enter that, it's asking me to go to another device and verify some notification they sent. I try to login on other devices but it keeps asking for an authenticator code when I never set up 2 step verification on my account. now it's impossible for me to log in!!

My account was suspended and disabled completely out of the blue for no reason. I've been a member for 20+ years. I received a random notification saying content of mine had been removed. I attempted to log on to check and couldn't login. Facebook says I need to log into my linked Instagram account. When I go to Instagram it says I need to log into my linked Facebook account. I can now no longer access either and have zero clue as to what happened or why.

helpful_negative.text: Photos won't upload to my phone's gallery anymore. Tried all the "fixes", none work. Instagram used to be such a fun app and now all I experience is frustration. After editing photos for a post for the last hour it just quit and I lost all the work and time. What a joke!! 0 stars and two thumbs down. STILL HAVING ISSUES!! Can't edit, freezes most of the time. New update is glitching, won't bring up tools, and tools aren't as easily accessible and less user-friendly. Can't edit pics.

The friends requests which I recieve have now piled up to 70+ but I can can't check for more than 10 requests at a time, because further it keeps buffering... This is happening for months now This app might be a very good app for social connections, but the bugs are increasing slowly. Now, it keeps showing notifications of the accounts that have been deleted!! I don't know if I can have a substitute of instagram, but THIS should not continue.

I can only imagine that Meta is actively trying to make the app worse. Now, when I click to see "more", there is a useless pop up window instead of just showing the text in place. This makes the text about ten times harder to read, since it's small and quickly scrolls out of view. I can't image a single user found this to be a better experience.

The UX of this app this is soo bad! So many bugs! While trying to make it more beautiful they forgot to think about the user experience and bugs! And the tap to pause has come and gone so many times, I mean what is the point of watching a reel without sound when we have buttons to control the volume. Very bad experience. also now i have multiple profiles including business profiles so on one of them there is no Ai and on the other there is no threads!! why??

The video calling on this app is hardly worth using. Each time I've used it, the video quality gets super pixilated and grainy anytime the service isn't exactly *perfect*. The calls also take way too much battery power, quickly heat up the phone, and have overheated the phone before. Having video call functionality is great, but when it's so cumbersome and not worth using, what's the point?

Worse with each passing day. It is so full of bugs that I have a feeling only interns work on it. E.g. the Mixed format is extremely bugged, stretching all horizontal images in the feed but appearing correctly on the profile. EDIT: Now broken on profile as well. Every post has been destroyed retroactively. Just hope it's not intended, but nothing would surprise me at this point. Not to mention the reels pushed down your throat constantly, and barely seeing posts from accounts you follow.

Moderately Fun, if not Slightly Invasive. The app is an alright place to see posts made by friends, but it's basically an Ad focused marketplace. There's pretty much only social media marketing here and a few small businesses, and it's lost its original intention of being a photo sharing app. The customer service is also pretty much not there at all and there is no moderation of comments, so it's become a hot bed for the worst possible responses on social media to exist so much so its a joke.

featureRequests.text: The new update is so buggy. Let's say I am going to post 5 photos, and I select to zoom them out so they aren't so close to my face. I can only zoom out one, and if I select more than 1 photo, it unzooms all of them. It has never done this before. The comments and notifications are weird as well. They glitch out, and when I go to click on the notification in the app, it doesn't let me, or it takes multiple times for it to work and bring me to where I need to be. Hope they fix this soon.

I deleted Instagram for a while to take a break from social media, came back to it and wish I hadn't. I don't know what the hell happened to this app but my feed refuses to load properly and gets stuck in an infinite loading loop. Even after closing and re-opening the app upwards of 10 times, it still struggles to process a feed. On the rare occasions it does, half of those times it loads a whopping TWO posts before I reach the bottom of the page and try to refresh again, and well....you know

Gives you copious amounts of options for notification settings, but completely ignores them. I tried turning off every single notification for my 2nd account, and I now get MORE notifications from it than I used to! Something's straight up broken with it. Terrible, had to just blanket block Instagram from my phone's settings because it absolutely does not follow the settings in the app. The annoying part is that I still wanted notifications from my other account.

My account was suspended and disabled completely out of the blue for no reason. I've been a member for 20+ years. I received a random notification saying content of mine had been removed. I attempted to log on to check and couldn't login. Facebook says I need to log into my linked Instagram account. When I go to Instagram it says I need to log into my linked Facebook account. I can now no longer access either and have zero clue as to what happened or why.
